## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Security Impact

- [ ] No security impact.
- [ ] Authentication or authorization behavior changed.
- [ ] XQL generation or execution behavior changed.
- [ ] Dataset or tool policy changed.
- [ ] Credential handling changed.

Explain the security impact:

## Validation

- [ ] `poetry run pytest`
- [ ] `poetry run ruff check src tests`
- [ ] Manual XSIAM/MCP test, if relevant

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated.
- [ ] Documentation updated.
- [ ] No secrets, tenant data, or query results committed.
- [ ] License impact considered.
- [ ] Backward compatibility considered.
